title: Zero In Antibacterial Home Flea Spray - 500 ml. Off-Pet Treatment Controls Fleas and Larvae in the Home and Kills Germs. Prevents Reinfestations. Ready-To-Use. Treats Carpets and Soft Furnishings
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Fast, effective control: home flea killer spray kills fleas and their larvae on contact
Suitable for use on furnishings: use on pet bedding, baskets, cushions, carpets, rugs and other furnishings around the home. Test on an inconspicuous area before full application
Solvent- and odour-free: the clear, water-based treatment is suitable for use in areas where children and pets may be present
ADVANCED formula comes ready to apply in a trigger spray bottle so not set-up is required
